title: pelargonium × fuerstenbergianum
intro: Pelargonium × fuerstenbergianum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Fuerstenberg's Pelargonium, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × fuerstenbergianum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, alleviate stress and anxiety, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant are commonly used in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
